jobs.job_text:
工作经验：结构 XPM、结构主设、结构 SE 等岗位一般要求 5 年以上工作经验，至少是高级工程师级别。
画图能力：岗位硬性要求会画图，特别是能画手机相关的大件，如整体大壳子等，只了解局部零部件或只能画小件的不符合要求。
项目经验：XPM 岗位需要有做过整个项目的 leader 经验，有项目推动和统筹能力。
专业背景：优先考虑有手机结构设计经验的，手持设备（如平板）、穿戴设备等通信终端产品经验可次优考虑。

core_skills: Full-product structural design (large casings, entire handheld devices)
Tooling and fixture design for mass production
Material selection (plastics/metals) and surface treatment process knowledge
Structural analysis and optimization for consumer electronics
BOM management and cross-functional team coordination
analysis.seniority: senior level (5+ years experience, senior engineer title or equivalent xpm/lead role)
experience: Proven track record of leading full-cycle mobile phone projects from concept to mass production
Hands-on experience designing large structural components (e.g., main shells/chassis), not just small parts
Extensive experience working with mold vendors and managing tooling processes
Experience coordinating with ID, R&D, production, and supply chain teams
hidden_rules: Candidates must demonstrate the ability to drive project timelines and resolve complex technical bottlenecks independently.
Experience exclusively with small components or accessories is insufficient; must show ownership of whole-device structural integrity.
Familiarity with major smartphone brands' supply chains or working environments (e.g., Huawei, vivo, OPPO ecosystems) is highly preferred.
Strong communication skills are implicitly required due to the heavy emphasis on cross-departmental leadership and supplier negotiation.

jobs.job_text:
1、驱动开发与移植：负责 MBB 产品如 CPE、网关等的以太网卡驱动、PHY 驱动及 GMAC 驱动等开发，像适配 Marvell、Intel 等主流网卡的驱动开发工作。同时要完成 Linux 等系统平台下网口驱动的 SDK 移植，搭建对应的开发环境，还需实现 PCI、PCIe 等网口相关硬件接口规范，确保驱动与硬件适配。

2、功能调试与问题排查：调试网口驱动相关的底层程序，处理网络中断、数据包处理和错误恢复等问题。借助 gdb、tcpdump 等调试工具，定位并解决产品测试、量产及市场反馈中出现的网口驱动相关软硬件故障，还要配合解决系统测试、场测里网口通信相关的异常问题。

3、性能优化与维护：针对 MBB 产品网口的数据传输速度、延迟、吞吐量等指标做性能调优，提升多核、高速网络环境下网口驱动的运行效率。长期维护网口驱动代码，跟进芯片、系统版本的更新，同步迭代驱动程序以保障兼容性，同时优化网口相关的功耗，契合 MBB 产品移动场景的续航需求。

core_skills: Ethernet PHY and GMAC Driver Porting
Device Adapter Development for Chips (Marvell, Intel)
analysis.seniority: mid-to-senior level (3-8+ years of relevant experience)
experience: Proven track record in Linux network driver development and porting
Experience debugging complex hardware/software interactions (packets, interrupts)
History of optimizing driver performance under high-load conditions
Familiarity with specific chip vendors (Qualcomm, Intel, Marvell, etc.)
Long-term maintenance experience of driver codebases across system versions
hidden_rules: Candidates must be based in or willing to relocate to Xi'an (implied by resume location clustering)
Strong proficiency in C is prioritized over general application development (Java/Web), even if listed
Ability to read Chinese chip datasheets and Linux kernel documentation without language barriers
Hands-on experience with hardware bring-up, not just application-layer networking

jobs.job_text:
任职要求：
1.通信专业毕业，3-5年射频工作经历，有手机开发经验优先
2.熟练使用仿真软件,原理图,PCB软件,罗德,安利等工具软件
3.熟练使用频谱仪，示波器，网络分析仪，综测仪等射频调试设备。
4.有高通,MTK，展锐平台开发经验，熟悉平台调试工具使用
5.具备较强责任心，团队意识，能承担较强工作压力，并能积极主动，具有不达目标不放弃的精神。
6.据采用的手机平台和业内技术水平确定手机各射频指标的设计目标；
7.按照3GPP/电信运营商/手机品牌公司的规范测试手机在各通讯制式（GSM/CDMA/WCDMA/TD-SCDMA/LTE）下的射频性能；

岗位职责：
1.射频 4G 5G 架构设计。
2.原理图设计，PCB检查。
3.射频关键器件验证选择。
4.射频有源无源调试。
5.认证问题解决。
3、分析调试解决测试时发现的问题；
4、设计手机RF电路图，检查PCB layout；
5、负责手机RF器件的选型，评估；
6、手机量产时，射频相关问题的产线支持

core_skills: Production line support for mass production
Modem configuration and software debugging (QXDM, QPST, Meta)
tools: EDA Software: Cadence, Altium Designer (AD), Mentor Graphics
Test Equipment: Spectrum Analyzer, Oscilloscope, Vector Network Analyzer (VNA), CMW500 (Rohde & Schwarz), Anritsu MT8821/MT8870/MT9080, Agilent E7515B (U8960), CW500, Teradyne/CW200
Platform Software: Qualcomm QXDM, QPST; MTK Meta tool; Samsung/Ericsson platform tools; Unisoc NVTool
Soldering/Rework: Hot air gun, precise soldering equipment
analysis.seniority: mid-to-senior level (3-5+ years of dedicated rf experience required)
experience: Proven experience in mobile phone development projects
Hands-on experience with Qualcomm, MTK, or Unisoc platforms
Full project lifecycle experience from EVT/DVT/PVT to MP (Mass Production)
Experience resolving certification issues and production line yields
Experience with both RF design/debugging and testing/validation
hidden_rules: Candidates must be willing to work under high pressure and tight deadlines (implied by 'no goal without persistence')
Strong capability to bridge the gap between R&D design and mass production execution is critical
Familiarity with specific test protocols (3GPP) and regional operator norms is essential
Hands-on soldering skills for small components (0201 size) are expected despite the engineering title
Ability to analyze logs (QXDM/Meta) is as important as using hardware analyzers
Experience with cost optimization and BOM evaluation is valued (evident from resumes discussing cost-saving solutions)
